package rulefixtures

// scenario for likely_n_squared_allocation: Opt-in deeper semantic signal for allocations that also sit inside nested loop structure.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule612NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario612Negative(records []Rule612NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
